goal.title: REPLACE_WITH_GOAL_TITLE
goal.objective: The research goal in one or two sentences. Open-ended is fine — milestones make it concrete.
context: Durable facts the campaign should never re-derive: paths, prior wins, prior failures, hardware constraints.
Explicit instruction examples: never weaken validators, never fake success.
success_criteria: Graded statements the final synthesis is judged against, e.g. 'we can name the current bottleneck with command-backed evidence'.
non_goals: Things the loop should record but not chase.
